title: Minecraft Experience Lily Pads
description: Add the Lily Pad textures from Minecraft Experience!
body:
## Add the Lily Pad textures from Minecraft Experience!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/minecraft-experience-lily-pads)




At the Minecraft Experience event, some lily pad textures were used that don't appear in vanilla Minecraft. This pack adds those textures into the game!
